title: atalantia guillauminii
intro: Atalantia guillauminii, also known as the 'Malayan Atalantia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Atalantia guillauminii include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory congestion, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Atalantia guillauminii is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties, although modern preparations may involve extraction of its essential oils and compounds for further research and application.
